title: Error: dial unix /var/folders/.../T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock: connect: no such file or directory
body:
### Issue Description

Every couple of days the podman engine stops and I get the following error:
```
podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Error: dial unix /var/folders/2y/kvrr5nws6xz4nx9vnwjxj17w0000gn/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock: connect: no such file or directory
```

The only way to start podman now is to reboot the computer.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Unfortunately it cannot be reproduced as it only happens after 24-48 hours.

podman version:
```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.5.0
API Version:  4.5.0
Go Version:   go1.20.3
Git Commit:   75e3c12579d391b81d871fd1cded6cf0d043550a
Built:        Fri Apr 14 15:28:20 2023
OS/Arch:      darwin/amd64

Server:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.4.4
API Version:  4.4.4
Go Version:   go1.20.1
Built:        Mon Apr  3 13:29:09 2023
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```


### Describe the results you received

podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Error: dial unix /var/folders/2y/kvrr5nws6xz4nx9vnwjxj17w0000gn/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock: connect: no such file or directory


### Describe the results you expected

podman not to stop in the first place and then to start

### podman info output

comments.body: does `/var/folders/2y/kvrr5nws6xz4nx9vnwjxj17w0000gn/T/podman/` exist when you get the failure ?

I already had to restart my computer and don't know if it still meaningful but this is what i see:
```
ls /var/folders/2y/kvrr5nws6xz4nx9vnwjxj17w0000gn/T/podman/
total 16
-rw-r--r--@ 1 doberkofler  staff  4 May  2 10:40 podman-machine-default_proxy.pid
srwxr-xr-x@ 1 doberkofler  staff  0 May  2 10:40 podman-machine-default_ready.sock
-rw-------@ 1 doberkofler  staff  5 May  2 10:40 podman-machine-default_vm.pid
srwxr-xr-x@ 1 doberkofler  staff  0 May  2 10:40 qmp_podman-machine-default.sock
```
if it happens again, please take a peek and see ...

I'm not sure, if this is related, but after I wanted to restart the engine because of another (#18444) issue I get the following error:
```
podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable
```

This seems to be the typical error now when podman crashes. Typically first all running container stop and can no longer be started but the engine is still running. After stopping the engine and trying to restart I get this error:

```
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable
```
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@baude Whats going on with this one?
I think it's a duplicate of https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/16054.  We're investigating.
